currency_note: INR prices reflect March 2026 Indian market.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Soft Goggles
items.description: India's most affordable branded swim goggle. Great starter option.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: New swimmers or casual users seeking an affordable, comfortable, and easy-to-use goggle for recreational swimming.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers or advanced users needing high-performance, low-drag goggles for racing or intense training.

items.name: Nivia Marine Swimming Goggles
items.description: Budget Indian brand goggles. Decent anti-fog and comfortable fit.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers seeking affordable, comfortable goggles for casual training and recreational use.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing high-performance, low-drag goggles for races.
common_complaints: May lack advanced features of premium goggles
Durability might be limited compared to higher-end options

items.name: Cosco Aqua Dash Swimming Goggles
items.description: Affordable Indian-brand goggles for recreational swimming.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers seeking affordable, comfortable goggles for casual use in pools or open water.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers or those needing high-performance, low-drag goggles for races.

items.name: Speedo Biofuse 2.0
items.description: Comfortable Speedo training goggles. Flexible seal for long sessions.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers prioritizing comfort and clear vision for regular training and extended pool sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Elite competitive swimmers who require ultra-low profile, minimal drag race goggles for sprint events.

items.name: Arena Cobra Ultra Swipe
items.description: Premium racing goggles with Swipe anti-fog. Low drag hydrodynamic design.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate to advanced swimmers focused on competitive racing and rigorous training, prioritizing speed and clear vision.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginners or casual swimmers seeking maximum comfort for leisurely pool time or extended wear.
common_complaints: May feel less comfortable for extended casual wear due to low-profile design.
standout_qualities: Superior anti-fog technology for lasting clarity

items.name: Speedo Fastskin Hyper Elite
items.description: Top-tier racing goggles. Ultra-low profile for maximum hydrodynamics.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers and elite racers seeking maximum hydrodynamic efficiency and clear vision for competitive events.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers or casual users looking for comfortable, everyday goggles for recreational swimming.
common_complaints: Can be less comfortable for long training sessions.
Higher price point compared to recreational options.
Requires precise fitting for optimal performance.
Mirrored lenses may be too dark for some indoor pools.
standout_qualities: Secure and precise IQ Fit technology.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Plus Swimsuit
items.description: Budget Decathlon swimsuit. Chlorine resistant polyester for pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers seeking an affordable, durable swimsuit for regular pool training and recreational use.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing a performance-oriented suit for races or advanced training.
standout_qualities: Excellent chlorine resistance for frequent pool use

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji 100 Jammer (Men)
items.description: Affordable men's jammer. Durable polyester for daily pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginners or casual swimmers seeking a durable, affordable jammer for regular pool training and fitness.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing maximum hydrodynamic performance for races or those preferring briefs/trunks.

items.name: Speedo Essential Endurance+ Jammer
items.description: Speedo's durable training jammer. Endurance+ fabric lasts 20x longer.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers seeking a highly durable, chlorine-resistant jammer for frequent training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual beachgoers or competitive swimmers needing maximum flexibility and minimal drag for race day.

items.name: Arena Team Stripe Swimsuit (Women)
items.description: Durable training suit from Arena. MaxLife fabric for extended use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers needing a highly durable, chlorine-resistant suit for regular training sessions and fitness swimming.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers seeking maximum speed for races or casual beachgoers wanting a relaxed fit.

items.name: Speedo Fastskin LZR Pure Intent Jammer
items.description: Top-tier FINA approved racing jammer. Maximum compression and hydrodynamics.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Elite competitive swimmers seeking maximum speed and hydrodynamics for FINA-approved races and personal bests.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Recreational swimmers or beginners needing a durable, comfortable suit for regular training or casual pool use.
common_complaints: Not chlorine resistant, limiting training use
High price point for specialized racing gear
Requires delicate care due to advanced fabric
standout_qualities: Provides maximum compression for muscle support
Engineered for superior hydrodynamics and speed

items.name: Arena Powerskin Carbon Air2 (Women)
items.description: Elite racing suit with carbon fiber cage. Maximum compression for competition.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers competing at elite levels, seeking maximum compression, hydrodynamic efficiency, and FINA approval for races.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual swimmers, beginners, or those prioritizing comfort and chlorine resistance for regular training or leisure.
common_complaints: Poor chlorine resistance for frequent use
Extremely tight fit, challenging to put on

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Silicone Swim Cap
items.description: Budget silicone swim cap. Durable and easy to put on.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginners and casual swimmers seeking a durable, easy-to-use, and affordable cap for recreational swimming or fitness.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers requiring a hydrodynamic cap for optimal race performance.

items.name: Nivia Classic Swim Cap
items.description: Affordable Indian brand silicone cap. Good for regular pool use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers and casual users seeking an affordable, durable silicone cap for regular pool use.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers requiring minimal drag or those needing specialized caps for open water conditions.

items.name: Speedo Plain Moulded Silicone Cap
items.description: Speedo's popular silicone cap. 3D moulded for comfortable fit.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers seeking a durable, comfortable cap for regular training and reducing drag.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginners on a very tight budget looking for the cheapest option.
common_complaints: May not keep hair completely dry
Can feel warm during intense sessions

items.name: Arena Moulded Pro II Silicone Cap
items.description: Premium racing cap. Dome shape reduces drag in competition.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate to advanced swimmers seeking a performance edge in competitive races and intense training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner or casual swimmers prioritizing comfort and affordability over speed and drag reduction.
standout_qualities: Optimized for speed and drag reduction

items.name: Speedo Fastskin Racing Cap
items.description: Elite racing cap. Wrinkle-free fit for minimum drag.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Elite swimmers seeking maximum hydrodynamic efficiency and a secure, wrinkle-free fit for competitive races.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Casual swimmers or beginners looking for a basic, comfortable cap for recreational use.
standout_qualities: Superior hydrodynamic design for minimal drag

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Short Fins
items.description: Affordable short fins for kick drills. Builds leg strength without changing technique.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers and those needing to improve leg strength and kick technique without altering natural movement.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced swimmers seeking maximum speed propulsion or competitive racers in open water events.

items.name: Speedo Biofuse Training Fins
items.description: Comfortable Speedo training fins. Biofuse technology for natural feel.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers improving kick technique, speed, and endurance during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Competitive swimmers needing maximum propulsion for racing or advanced power training.

items.name: Arena Powerfin Pro
items.description: Premium training fins. Angled blade for efficient kick training.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers aiming to enhance kick power, improve technique, and build leg strength during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Absolute beginners needing buoyancy assistance or advanced swimmers seeking maximum propulsion for race simulation.
standout_qualities: Efficient kick training due to angled blade

items.name: FINIS Zoomers Gold Fins
items.description: Natural rubber fins for serious training. Great for building kick tempo.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers focused on refining kick technique, increasing tempo, and building leg endurance during serious training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginners needing maximum propulsion or casual swimmers looking for effortless gliding and buoyancy.
standout_qualities: Excellent for developing kick tempo and technique

items.name: TYR Crossblade Training Fins
items.description: Advanced training fins with cross-blade design for varied resistance.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers and triathletes focusing on refining kick technique, building leg strength, and improving ankle flexibility in structured pool training.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginners needing basic buoyancy assistance or casual swimmers seeking maximum propulsion for leisurely swims.
standout_qualities: Cross-blade design provides varied resistance for targeted training.
Multi-density silicone offers comfort and enhanced durability.
Aids in refining kick technique and building leg strength.

items.name: Decathlon Nabaiji Pull Buoy
items.description: Affordable pull buoy for arm stroke drills. Good buoyancy for beginners.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Beginner swimmers focusing on arm stroke technique and isolating the upper body during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced swimmers needing minimal buoyancy or competitive swimmers focused on speed training.

items.name: Speedo Elite Pull Buoy
items.description: Speedo branded pull buoy. Ergonomic shape for comfortable use.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers aiming to isolate upper body, improve stroke technique, and build arm strength during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Swimmers needing full-body coordination practice or those focused solely on direct speed in races.
standout_qualities: High buoyancy for effective leg support

items.name: Arena Pull Kick Pro
items.description: Dual-purpose pull buoy and kickboard. Versatile training aid.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Intermediate swimmers isolating arm or leg strokes to improve technique, body position, and endurance during training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers needing full body support or advanced competitors seeking race-specific performance gains.

items.name: FINIS Axis Buoy
items.description: Advanced pull buoy with aligned buoyancy. Forces proper body rotation.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers aiming to isolate upper body, improve core rotation, and refine stroke technique for competitive performance.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers or those seeking a relaxed swim without specific technical training objectives.
standout_qualities: Enhances core rotation for stroke efficiency

items.name: TYR Pull Float
items.description: Durable TYR pull float. High-density foam for consistent buoyancy.

fit_profile.best_for_persona: Advanced swimmers isolating upper body for strength, endurance, and refining stroke technique in pool training sessions.
fit_profile.not_for_persona: Beginner swimmers needing full body coordination practice or open water swimmers requiring leg propulsion.
